stemHtml: During the taxi out to the runway, an aircraft receives the following report from ATC: "All stations, ATHINAI Ground, CPDLC failure, standby for Ground 121.750". ATC is informing all aircraft of a...

options.a: complete CPDLC system failure and to contact Ground on frequency 121.750.
options.b: single CPDLC message failure and to contact Ground on frequency 121.750.
options.c: single CPDLC message failure and to wait to be called by Ground.
options.d: complete CPDLC system failure and to wait to be called by Ground.
